name: Wayfinder Engine
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y clang lld libc++-dev libc++abi-dev libx11-dev libxext-dev libxrandr-dev libxcursor-dev libxfixes-dev libxi-dev libxss-dev libxtst-dev libxkbcommon-dev libasound2-dev libpulse-dev libpipewire-0.3-dev libdbus-1-dev libudev-dev libdrm-dev libgbm-dev libgl1-mesa-dev libegl1-mesa-dev libdecor-0-dev libwayland-dev && cmake --preset ci-linux
